title: erigeron caucasicus subsp. caucasicus
intro: Erigeron caucasicus subsp. caucasicus, also known as Caucasian daisy, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Caucasus region. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Erigeron caucasicus subsp. caucasicus include its ability to support the immune system, relieve stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
